text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day before her debut, Seiun Sky trains with
her rivals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This includes Special Week, with her keen final
sprint, and the quietly passionate Grass Wonder...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As well as El Condor Pasa, who wants to dominate
the racing world, and the first-rate elite, King
Halo.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a generation bursting with natural talent, but
Sky is determined not to give up the lead.
